en-US.summary: Find and book HVAC service pros in Orlando
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask UpTend to find me AC repair
Alexa, tell UpTend my AC is broken
en-US.name: UpTend Home Services
en-US.description: UpTend connects you with vetted, licensed home service professionals in the Orlando Metro area. Just tell Alexa what's wrong and we'll have a tech call you back within the hour. HVAC services are live now — AC repair, heating, maintenance, and emergency service. More services coming soon.
